content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_M3_OCUSMA as
-- DROP VIEW    v_M3_OCUSMA
SELECT          distinct OC.*
,               CASE WHEN STAT = '10' THEN 'Preliminary'
                WHEN STAT = '11' THEN 'Temporary Customer Number'
                WHEN STAT = '12' THEN 'Incorrect Values'
                WHEN STAT = '20' THEN 'Definite'
                WHEN STAT = '90' THEN 'Blocked/Expired' end AS 'STAT_DESCRIPTION'
,               CASE WHEN CUTP = '0' THEN 'Normal'
                WHEN CUTP = '1' THEN 'Bonus/Commission'
                WHEN CUTP = '2' THEN 'Payer'
                WHEN CUTP = '4' THEN 'Ship-Via'
                WHEN CUTP = '7' THEN 'Internal'
                WHEN CUTP = '8' THEN 'Temporary Customer'
                WHEN CUTP = '9' THEN 'Temporary Customer Group' end AS 'CUTP_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS.TX40 AS 'SDST_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS2.TX40 AS 'SMCD_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS3.TX40 AS 'FRE1_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS4.TX15 AS 'TEPY_DESCRIPTION'
,               OO.TX40 AS 'ORTP_DESCRIPTION'
,               CS5.TX40 AS 'CUCL_DESCRIPTION'
,               CG.A330 AS SALES_ADMIN
,               OG.DISP*1.00/100 as Discount
FROM            M3.OCUSMA OC
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.SDST = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SDST'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON OC.SMCD = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON OC.FRE1 = CS3.STKY AND CS3.STCO = 'FRE1'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS4 ON OC.TEPY = CS4.STKY AND CS4.STCO = 'TEPY' AND CS4.LNCD = 'GB'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS5 ON OC.CUCL = CS5.STKY AND CS5.STCO = 'CUCL'
LEFT JOIN       M3.OOTYPE OO ON OC.ORTP = OO.ORTP
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA' AND CG.A330 <> ''
LEFT JOIN       M3.OGDMTX OG on OC.CUNO = OG.OBV1 and OC.DISY = OG.DISY
